summary: Iteration-5 backend + frontend testing complete. Added 11 new pytest cases for Facilities CRUD, facility clash detection (shared vs non-shared), /facility-conflicts, stats.facilities, super-admin totals.facilities, Classes CRUD with standard/division/section_id/facility_id/shift_id, /migrate/standard-division and sections regression. Also patched 3 pre-existing tests for the rebrand: class names migrated 'Grade 6 - A' -> 'Standard 6 - A', and the 'Value Education clubbing' cross-class hard rule (intentional) was excluded from the per-class autogen-clean assertions. Final: 63/63 pytests passing in ~79s. Frontend verified end-to-end with injected Super Admin session: brand, title, super-admin-btn -> /super, Facilities nav + CRUD modal, Classes form (Standard/Division/Section/Home Facility), Dashboard Facilities tile + Stop-gap widget, Allotments bulk hint uses 'Standard 6 - A'.

issues: Console warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (a11y minor)

action_items: Optional: add aria-describedby to Dialog content in Facilities + Classes modals to silence the radix warning (a11y polish).
critical_code_review_comments: _check_facility_clash queries both override facility_id on cells and home facility_id on classes — correct, but reads facilities.find_one twice per upsert in hot path; could be cached at request scope for big timetables.
facility-conflicts endpoint sorts by descending count but does not paginate; fine for current scale (~50 classes) but should be capped for very large schools.

Pre-existing 'Value Education clubbing' hard rule is cross-class — it now fires after any single-class autogen because the other Standard-6 sections aren't co-generated. Not a regression (rule was added in earlier iterations) but consider downgrading to soft or scoping cross-class checks to /audit-all only.
test_credentials: Injected Super Admin session via mongosh per /app/auth_testing.md (token: fe_test_*, user role 'Super Admin').
seed_data_creation: Relied on existing /api/seed/sri-ma-vidyalaya/full (idempotent). Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed Facilities (Room_101, Playground, AudioLab, OpenCourt, HomeRoom_Z9), one TEST_ Class (Standard 12 - Z), one TEST_ Section (Section_X9). All deleted after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_backend.py now has 63 tests across iterations 1-5. Iteration-5 classes: TestFacilitiesCRUD, TestFacilityClash, TestFacilityConflictsEndpoint, TestStatsAndSuperAdminFacilities, TestClassesStandardDivision, TestMigrateStandardDivision, TestSectionsCRUDRegression. The facility clash test uses Sat + last period to avoid colliding with autogen cells. Class-name lookups now accept both 'Standard 6 - A' and legacy 'Grade 6 - A'. The clubbing-rule exclusion in TestAuditEndpoint.test_audit_clean_class_after_autogen and TestOptimizeEndpoint.test_optimize_clean_class_returns_clean_message is intentional — see code review comment #3.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures in current iteration.
